hooks.command:
echo '[RobotInc Auto-Onboarding]
Before replying: check <config>/.otto-met (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR if set, else ~/.claude).
Missing -> run roll-call before your first reply (banner, card, seat question). No command needed.
Present -> skip roll-call. Read <config>/otto-profile.json. Unless style.avoid has session-start-brief,
read ./TASKS.md and ./.claude/otto-trace.log in THIS directory only, and open with a capped brief
(doing items + last 2 trace lines, max 5 lines, no headers). Nothing to report -> just ask
What can I help with?'
